title: Additional Tool Post-Install Hooks
description: Add default post-install hooks for additional tools that would benefit from shell integration, completions, or configuration setup
acceptance_criteria: Each tool hook is idempotent (grep before append)
Hooks are advisory (failures are warnings, not errors)
User-defined hooks take precedence over default hooks
All hooks work cross-platform where applicable
jarvy tools --default-hooks shows all new hooks

hook_types: shell_integration - Add init/eval to shell rc

tasks.title: delta - Git pager integration
tasks.description: Configure git to use delta as the default pager
tasks.hook_script: git config --global core.pager delta && git config --global interactive.diffFilter 'delta --color-only'
tasks.notes: delta provides beautiful git diffs but requires git config to use it

tasks.title: eza - Shell aliases
tasks.description: Add aliases to replace ls with eza
tasks.hook_script: Add alias ls='eza', alias ll='eza -l', alias la='eza -la' to shell rc
tasks.notes: eza is a modern ls replacement with better colors and git integration

tasks.title: ripgrep - Shell completion
tasks.notes: ripgrep can generate its own completions

tasks.title: tmux - Plugin manager setup
tasks.hook_script: Print note about TPM installation for plugin management
tasks.notes: TPM is optional but commonly used

tasks.title: kubectx - Shell completion
tasks.description: Add kubectx and kubens shell completions
tasks.hook_script: Source kubectx/kubens completions from installation directory
tasks.notes: Completions help with context and namespace switching

tasks.title: minikube - Shell completion
tasks.notes: minikube can generate its own completions

tasks.title: kind - Shell completion
tasks.notes: kind can generate its own completions

tasks.title: argocd - Shell completion and login note
tasks.description: Add argocd shell completions and login advisory
tasks.notes: Also include advisory about 'argocd login' setup

tasks.title: nvim - Config directory setup
tasks.description: Create basic nvim config directory structure
tasks.hook_script: Print note about ~/.config/nvim setup and popular configs (LazyVim, NvChad)
tasks.notes: Don't auto-configure nvim, just provide guidance

tasks.title: fd - Shell alias
tasks.description: Add fd alias for find replacement
tasks.hook_script: Add alias find='fd' to shell rc (optional)
tasks.notes: fd is a simpler, faster alternative to find

implementation_notes.pattern: Follow existing hook pattern in define_tool! macro
implementation_notes.idempotency: Always check before modifying shell rc files
implementation_notes.cross_platform: Use shell-detection from hooks.rs for appropriate rc file
implementation_notes.priority: These are nice-to-have, not critical for tool functionality
